jd_text: Working alongside a collaborative team at the Corporate Head Office in Hong Kong, we are seeking a Vice President, Digital Product and E-Commerce to join our Sales & Marketing Department. In this influential leadership role, you will lead the evolving digital product and CRM platform strategies for The Peninsula Hotels with a focus on driving revenue growth, optimiSing user experience, integration of core content and commerce platforms, while improving guest retention and enhancing conversion and engagement across critical digital touchpoints. This role will oversee the brand’s primary direct digital channels and associated content and transactional systems, and will also oversee our evolving CRM/CDP platforms leveraging AI driven technology to enable personalised digital and operational experiences .
